All Events

Highlights from Every Chapter

Product Launch
4 photos

Grand launch of i-Minvare FM, i-Minvare PM, i-Geoprovare G & P — GMP-certified aquaculture mineral supplements attended by industry leaders and VIP guests.

Minvare & Geoprovare Product Launch

📅 2024📍 Hyderabad, Telangana
View Gallery →
Conference
14 photos

Annual gathering of 600+ aquaculture professionals. Innovare showcased GMP-certified products and presented research on probiotic feed supplements.

Annual Meet & Celebrations

📅 22nd August, 2022📍 Hyderabad, Telangana
View Gallery →
Exhibition
4 photos

Innovare's most recent Aquaex exhibition — expanded product lines, research updates, and connecting with aquaculture communities across India.

Aquaex India 2022

📅 2022📍 India
View Gallery →
Exhibition
16 photos

Innovare's participation at Aquaex India 2022 — showcasing GMP-certified aquaculture supplements to buyers, farmers, and industry leaders.

Aquaex India 2023

📅 2023📍 India
View Gallery →
Exhibition
16 photos

Innovare exhibited at Aquaex India 2023 in Bhimavaram — the heart of India's shrimp farming belt. Live demonstrations, farmer interactions, and product showcases.

Aquaex India 2025

📅 2025📍 Bhimavaram, West Godavari, Andhra Pradesh
View Gallery →
Tour
20 photos

Innovare team visited key aquaculture farms and distributors across Vietnam, introducing our mineral supplement range to international markets.

Thailand Tour

📅 2023📍 Thailand
View Gallery →
Tour
15 photos

Farm visits and trade meetings across Thailand's shrimp-farming regions, showcasing i-Minvare and i-Geoprovare to international buyers.

India's innovative manufacturer & exporter of aquaculture products. From hatchery to harvest.
